nasb.text: Can your heart endure, or can your hands be strong in the days that I will deal with you? I, the Lord, have spoken and will act.

esv.text: Can your courage endure, or can your hands be strong, in the days that I shall deal with you? I the Lord have spoken, and I will do it.

cnv.text: 到了我懲治你的日子，你的心還能受得住嗎？你的手還有力嗎？我耶和華說了，就必實行。

ccb.text: 在我惩罚你的日子，你还有勇气和力量吗？我耶和华言出必行，
